DECLARE num1 integer;
SET num1 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.var);

DECLARE x1 integer;
SELECT x1 FROM (SELECT 1 AS x1 UNION SELECT 2) AS temp;

DECLARE ratio float;
SET ratio = (SELECT avg(value) FROM temp_table WHERE id < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table));

DECLARE multi_var integer, sum_var float;
SET sum_var = (SELECT SUM(value) FROM temp_table WHERE id = multi_var);

DECLARE var1 integer;
SET var1 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM temp_table) AS unique_ids);
